articles.title: How Indian scientists are mapping the brain's last frontier - BBC
articles.description: India's new brainstem atlas offers scientists an unprecedented map of one of the brain's least known regions.
articles.content: Partha Mitra, a brain scientist at the prestigious New York-based Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory who has worked with SGBC, says detailed brain atlases like this could have a "transformative impact" on… [+151 chars]
